2606.11816.title: WorldReasoner: Evaluating Whether Language Model Agents Forecast Events with Valid Reasoning
2606.11816.paper_summary: Forecasting real-world events requires language-model agents to reason under uncertainty from incomplete, time-bounded information. Yet evaluating whether agents genuinely forecast requires more than final-answer accuracy: a model may be correct by recalling memorized training facts, citing fabricated evidence, or producing an unsupported causal story. We present WorldReasoner, an evaluation framework for temporally valid event forecasting. Each task gives an agent a resolved forecasting question, a simulated forecast date, and access only to evidence available before that date; after resolution, the framework scores the submitted probability, cited evidence, and optional causal event graph. WorldReasoner reports three complementary axes: outcome quality against resolved answers, evidence quality over cited sources, and reasoning quality against post-resolution hindsight graphs. The benchmark is built by an agentic construction pipeline that generates forecasting questions, collects time-stamped evidence, and builds hindsight reference graphs at scale, yielding 345 resolved tasks derived from 14,141 articles with graphs covering 8,087 extracted events. Across six controlled agent settings, temporally valid retrieval is the strongest driver of outcome accuracy; causal graph construction improves key-event recovery; and correct graph-enabled forecasts are more strongly grounded in key events and relevant sources, yet agents still struggle to convert grounded evidence into calibrated probabilities.
2606.11816.paper_summary_zh: 預測真實世界事件需要語言模型代理在不確定性下從不完整的、時間有限的信息中進行推理。<lb/>然而，評估代理是否真正進行預測需要的不僅僅是最終答案的準確性：一個模型可能通過回憶記憶中的訓練事實、引用虛構的證據或產生不支持的因果故事來正確。<lb/>我們提出了WorldReasoner，一個用於時間有效事件預測的評估框架。<lb/>每個任務為代理提供一個解決的預測問題、一個模擬的預測日期，以及僅能訪問在該日期之前可用的證據；在解決後，該框架評分提交的概率、引用的證據和可選的因果事件圖。<lb/>WorldReasoner報告三個互補的軸心：針對解決答案的結果質量、針對引用來源的證據質量，以及針對解決後的回顧圖的推理質量。<lb/>該基準是通過一個代理建構管道建立的，該管道生成預測問題、收集時間戳證據，並大規模構建回顧參考圖，產生了345個來自14,141篇文章的解決任務，這些圖涵蓋了8,087個提取的事件。<lb/>在六個受控的代理設置中，時間有效的檢索是結果準確性的最強驅動因素；因果圖的構建改善了關鍵事件的恢復；並且正確的圖形啟用預測更強烈地基於關鍵事件和相關來源，但代理仍然難以將基於證據的內容轉化為經過校準的概率。
2606.11816.author: Yizhou Chi et.al.
2606.11816.authors: Yizhou Chi, Eric Chamoun, Zifeng Ding, Andreas Vlachos
